title: Jameda Search Scraper
description: Search Jameda doctor profiles by specialty, doctor name, and optional German location.

searches.title: Searches
searches.description: Recommended. Process many Jameda query/location searches in one Apify run so run startup and storage overhead are shared across doctor results.

q.title: Legacy Search Query
q.description: Backward-compatible single doctor name, specialty, symptom, or medical service to search on Jameda. Prefer searches for normal usage, especially when running more than one query.

loc.title: Legacy Location
loc.description: Optional German city or location for the legacy single query.

per_page.title: Results Per Page
per_page.description: Maximum doctor results to save per page. Jameda returns up to 28 results per page.

max_pages.title: Maximum Pages
max_pages.description: Number of result pages to fetch, starting from Start Page.
